case_title: IMELDA TINAGAN VS. MATTRESS FIRM INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY TINAGAN, IMELDA AS TO DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC.
ORDER OEX OFF CALENDAR. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-21-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-21-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELIZABETH ZAREH. PLAINTIFF IMELDA TINAGAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY LARRY SCHOFIELD, S.F. DISTRICT MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELIZABETH ZAREH; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY SCHOFIELD, LARRY HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TINAGAN, IMELDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MATTRESS FIRM INC. $808.01 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $808.01 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF ADDING THIRD PARTY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TINAGAN, IMELDA
THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED FILED JANUARY 04, 2018.
